content_en:
70 the cover of Taqwa (piety and fear from Him) and bring delight to your eyes when you see the flag of Islam raised as high as it should be.

l 71 * Allah said:

"The likeness of those who spend their wealth in the way of Allah, is as the likeness of a grain (of com); it grows seven ears, and each ear has a hundred grains. Allah gives manifold increase to whom He wills. And Allah is All-Sufficient for His creatures' needs, All-Knower." (2:261) * The Messenger of Allah ;i said: :,;s; .Jt d: ~ .-:, I~ '11 0.J~~~ jP> d;...::.. JW,.\14 I.J):4)) .Jt 'I~ G;. .Jt 'IJt't. t;; .Jt 'I~ W.; ) '~ ~ ~

. «:/I.J ~~t ~L:Jlj ~L:.ll .Jt '~~:.1 ~Li. ~ J~iJI . "Rush to perform good deeds before the coming of seven; do not await poverty that brings forgetfulness, or wealth that brings pride, or illness that brings weakness, or old age that brings feebleness, or death that brings demise, or the False Messiah, and he is the worst awaited absentee, or the Hour, and the Hour is truly more horrible and bitter." (Al-Tirmidhi) * Shaikh Al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah said: "Repentance is not only from committing sins, as many ignorant people think; they cannot see repentance except only from committing evil immoral deeds. Rather, repenting from abandoning performing necessary righteous deeds, is more important than repenting from committing prohibited evil actions."
content_id:
Benih kebenaran terakhir yang dibahas dalam karya ini adalah istiqamah — konsistensi dalam ketaatan kepada Allah. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Amalan yang paling dicintai Allah adalah yang paling konsisten (dawam) meskipun sedikit." (HR Bukhari dan Muslim)

Istiqamah bukan tentang kesempurnaan — ia tentang konsistensi. Seorang Muslim yang shalat lima waktu dengan khusyuk setiap hari lebih baik dari orang yang sesekali shalat dengan sangat khusyuk lalu lama tidak shalat. Allah menghargai amalan yang berkelanjutan meskipun kecil karena itu menunjukkan ketulusan dan keteguhan hati.

Untuk membangun istiqamah: mulailah dari yang kecil dan mudah, buat rutinitas harian yang Islami, carilah teman-teman yang menguatkan keimanan, dan selalu ingat bahwa Allah melihat setiap amalan sekecil apapun. Benih-benih kebenaran yang ditanam dengan istiqamah akan menjadi taman yang indah di hati dan kelak menjadi ladang pahala yang tiada habis-habisnya di akhirat.
content_ar: 70 the cover of التقوى (piety and الخوف from Him) and bring delight to your eyes عندما you see the flag of الإسلام raised as high as it should be. l 71 * الله said: "The likeness of those who spend their الثروة in the الطريق of الله, is as the likeness of a grain (of com); it grows seven ears, and each ear has a hundred grains. الله gives manifold increase to whom He wills. And الله is All-Sufficient for His creatures' needs, All-Knower." (2:261) * الرسول ﷺ of الله ;i said: :,;s; .Jt d: ~ .-:, I~ '11 0.J~~~ jP> d;...::.. JW,.\14 I.J):4)) .Jt 'I~ G;. .Jt 'IJt't. t;; .Jt 'I~ W.; ) '~ ~ ~ . «:/I.J ~~t ~L:Jlj ~L:.ll .Jt '~~:.1 ~Li. ~ J~iJI . "Rush to perform الخير deeds قبل the coming of seven; do not await الفقر that brings forgetfulness, or الثروة that brings الكبر, or المرض that brings الضعف, or old age that brings feebleness, or الموت that brings demise, or the المسيح الدجال, and he is the worst awaited absentee, or the Hour, and the Hour is truly more horrible and bitter." (Al-الترمذي) * Shaikh Al-الإسلام ابن تيمية said: "التوبة is not only from committing الذنوب, as many ignorant people think; they cannot see التوبة except only from committing الشر immoral deeds. Rather, repenting from abandoning performing necessary الصالح deeds, is more المهم than repenting from committing prohibited الشر actions."
